_README: Copy this file to profiles/<iso639_3>.json and fill it in. This single JSON + the reference pack in references/ is everything language-specific. The engine code never changes. JSON has no comments, so each field is documented in profiles/README.md. Delete the _README and any _example_* keys you don't need.
script: describe the script/orthography, e.g. 'Latin romanization' or 'Arabic script'
divine_name: how the divine name is rendered

borrowings._example: wider-communication form -> the attested local form to prefer

linter_rules.message: what is wrong and what to use instead

density_checks.message: discouraged form is overused relative to the preferred form

incontext_patterns.name: Example construction — short label
incontext_patterns.note: one line on what this construction is / when to use it
incontext_patterns.pattern: regex matching the construction in corpus verses

structure_patterns.desc: how the corpus opens a scene (used by find-structures.ts)
